description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the 'CalibrationChecker' C# console application loaded. This tool analyzes robotic joint calibration files and needs to be deployed to factory floor PCs that do not have the .NET runtime installed. Publish this application as a self-contained, single-file executable for the win-x64 runtime to C:\PublishOutput. The final output should be a standalone executable with no accompanying .dll files.
